title: onopordum bracteatum subsp. myriacanthum
intro: Onopordum bracteatum subsp. myriacanthum, also known as the thistle-like plant or cotton thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onopordum bracteatum subsp. myriacanthum include potential relief from digestive issues and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in tinctures or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
